seoTitle: Wuruma Dam vs Wutul — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wuruma Dam and Wutul. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wuruma Dam vs Wutul: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wuruma Dam and Wutul.
heading: Wuruma Dam vs Wutul — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wuruma Dam, Queensland and Wutul, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wutul has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Wuruma Dam (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wuruma Dam or Wutul safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wuruma Dam has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Wutul scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wuruma Dam scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Wutul scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wuruma Dam or Wutul?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wutul has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
